name: Fresh Mango Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chinese preserved black beans, rinsed
2 Red jalapeno peppers, sliced into thin rings
1/2 cup Mixed, chopped fresh herbs (e.g., oregano)
Zest and juice of one lime
Zest and juice of one orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients; adjust seasoning with salt and citrus.
2. Let sit for a few hours before serving.
